title: Israel Claims Killed Al Jazeera Journalist Was Active Hamas Militant
detail: The Israeli military claimed on April 9, 2026, that the Al Jazeera journalist killed in Gaza was an active Hamas militant, directly contradicting Al Jazeera's condemnation of the killing as a 'heinous crime' targeting a journalist. Israel's military stated it had intelligence identifying the journalist as an operative of Hamas's military wing. Al Jazeera disputed the characterization as a disinformation campaign designed to justify the targeting of press personnel and deflect accountability. The killing intensified international pressure over Israel's press freedom record in Gaza, where over 170 journalists have been killed since October 2023 — the highest toll for any single conflict on record according to the Committee to Protect Journalists.
